meaning: n.[药]德美罗,度冷丁(镇痛药哌替啶的商品名)
examples: Demerol: a trademark used for a medicinal preparation of meperidine.
Reports in the Sun suggested that Jackson may have collapsed after an injection of Demerol, a powerful painkiller that can in certain circumstances increase the risk of cardiac arrest.
Singer Michael Jackson was probably addicted to the painkiller Demerol, a witness for the defence in the trial of his doctor, Conrad Murray, has said.
He said one of the symptoms of Demerol withdrawal included insomnia.
